# Ghost Card

> Ghost Card is a free disc golf scoring app. Play against ghost versions of real PDGA-rated pros, track round history, earn horror-themed bag tags, and run multi-round Tour Mode tournaments across 7,008 US courses.

## What Ghost Card does

Ghost Card lets disc golfers:
- Score rounds hole-by-hole with a live leaderboard
- Play against ghost opponents drawn from 134 real PDGA-rated pros (MPO and FPO)
- Run multi-round Tour Mode events with DGPT-style points and season standings
- Earn 30 horror-themed collectible bag tags across four rarity tiers (Common, Uncommon, Rare, Legendary)
- Save and review full round history with hole-by-hole breakdowns
- Submit community par corrections for any of 7,008 US disc golf courses
- Play Horror Mode — a 50-card overlay game on top of a normal round (2+ players)
- Add friends and see their recent rounds in an activity feed
- Race a friend's best ghost on the live leaderboard (cyan ghost row)
- Beat your own Personal Best ghost at each course (gold ghost row)
- Track GC Rating trend over your last 20 rounds with a visual sparkline
- Share round badges — exportable summary images of completed rounds

## App

The app lives at: https://app.ghostcard.live
It is a React + Vite single-page app, deployed on Vercel, with Supabase for auth and data.
No download required. Free to use.

## Ghost opponents

Pros are sourced from PDGA ratings. Ghost scores are simulated using each pro's rating against the course SSA. The top-rated MPO pros include Gannon Buhr (1027), Ricky Wysocki (1044), Paul McBeth (1041), Calvin Heimburg (1036), and Eagle McMahon (1033). FPO field is led by Missy Gannon (1000) and Catrina Allen (988).

## Bag tags

30 collectible horror-themed tags. Earned by in-round performance and actions — not purchased. The Bone Collector tag unlocks after submitting 5 community par corrections. Legendary tags are the rarest and hardest to earn.

## Tour Mode

Supports Standard events (3 rounds), Elite+ events, Majors (5 rounds), and Finale events. Points are DGPT-calibrated. Season standings track across events.

## Horror Mode

A 50-card card game overlay played on top of a normal disc golf round. Requires 2+ players. Cards fall into four categories: Haunt (played on opponents), Spirit (played on yourself), Reckoning (held until round end), and Wild. Skins are tracked per hole.

## Friends & Feed

Mutual friendships with a 20-friend cap. Add friends by display name on the Profile tab. Friend ghosts appear as cyan rows on the live leaderboard when playing courses friends have played. Quick-add friend chips appear during card setup for multiplayer rounds.

## Personal Best Ghost

When playing a course you've played before, your previous best round appears as a gold "YOUR BEST" ghost row on the live leaderboard, tracking hole by hole with real score data. Round Complete shows new PB celebrations with hole-by-hole comparisons.

## Rating Trend

A sparkline chart on the History screen shows GC Rating movement across the last 20 rated rounds. Green trend line means improving, orange means declining. Best-ever rating is marked. Requires 2+ rated rounds.

## Share Badge

Every completed round generates an exportable summary badge image showing course, date, score, division, format, and GC Rating. Uses Ghost Card brand treatment (dark background, gold accents, FlatGhost icon).

## Brand

Name: Ghost Card
Tagline: Haunt the Leaderboard
Vibe: Horror-themed disc golf. A24 horror meets real sport. Dark, cinematic, competitive — not campy.
Primary color: #0D1426 (Void navy)
Accent: #C9A84C (Lantern Gold), #CF9120 (Harvest Gold)
Font: Inter only
GitHub: https://github.com/deanlamont/ghost-card
